name: vercel-ai-context-meter
title: Context Meter
author: Vercel
description: A model context meter with token breakdown, capacity, and estimated cost.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Replaced the AI SDK type-only usage shape with an equivalent local structural type.
Changed physical spacing utilities to logical equivalents for RTL.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Replaced the AI SDK type-only usage shape with an equivalent local structural type. Changed physical spacing utilities to logical equivalents for RTL.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
